title: Length of Longest Fibonacci Subsequence
hints: Since the array is sorted, any valid subsequence must also be sorted. Try fixing the first two elements to start building a sequence.
Use a hash map to store the index of each number for O(1) lookups. Given two starting numbers, can you generate the rest of the sequence?
Iterate over all pairs (arr[i], arr[j]) as the first two elements. Use binary search or a set to find subsequent terms and track the maximum length found.
